_comment: Verified free-tier / rate-limit table for programmatic LLM API access. Every entry re-verified against the provider's OWN public docs on the as_of date — no third-hand listicle numbers. 'unpublished' means the provider hides the figures behind a login; we say so instead of quoting rumors. Free tiers are the most volatile numbers in this repo: if a row drifted, open an issue.

free_tiers.free_offer: Any model ID ending in :free costs $0 with a plain account
free_tiers.limits: 20 req/min shared across all :free models; 50 req/day if lifetime credit purchases < $10, 1,000 req/day with a one-time $10+ top-up
free_tiers.catch: free routes go to third-party providers that may train on your data per their own policies; OpenRouter exposes separate free/paid routing settings — check them

free_tiers.free_offer: Flash-class models free of charge on the API free tier
free_tiers.limits: per-model RPM/RPD no longer published publicly — visible only in AI Studio after login (aistudio.google.com/rate-limit); measured in RPM / input TPM / RPD, per project; RPD resets midnight Pacific; preview/experimental models throttled tighter
free_tiers.models: Gemini 3.5 Flash, 3.1 Flash-Lite, 2.5 Flash / Flash-Lite, Gemma 4, Gemini Embedding
free_tiers.card_required: no (Tier 1 upgrade requires a billing account)
free_tiers.catch: free-tier content is 'used to improve our products' (pricing-page wording); paid tier is not
free_tiers.confidence: verified (tier structure and data-use wording; exact numbers are login-walled by Google)

free_tiers.free_offer: All hosted open-weight models usable on the Free Plan with per-model caps
free_tiers.limits: per-model, e.g. llama-3.3-70b 30 RPM / 1K RPD / 12K TPM / 100K TPD; gpt-oss-120b 30 RPM / 1K RPD / 8K TPM / 200K TPD; llama-3.1-8b-instant 30 RPM / 14.4K RPD / 6K TPM / 500K TPD; qwen3-32b 60 RPM / 1K RPD / 6K TPM / 500K TPD; limits are org-level
free_tiers.models: GPT-OSS-120B/20B, Llama-4-Scout, Llama-3.3-70B, Qwen3-32B, Whisper Large V3
free_tiers.card_required: no for free use per billing FAQ (payment method needed only to upgrade to Developer tier)
free_tiers.catch: daily token caps burn fast on 70B+ models (100K-200K tokens/day); positioned as a trial

free_tiers.free_offer: Free Trial tier, flat limits across listed models
free_tiers.limits: 5 RPM / 30K TPM / 1M tokens per hour / 1M tokens per day, org-level
free_tiers.models: gpt-oss-120b, zai-glm-4.7, gemma-4-31b (the three on the official free-trial limits table)
free_tiers.card_required: not stated on any official page
free_tiers.catch: 5 RPM is single-user interactive only; 'access to all models' marketing vs 3 models on the actual limits table; paid Developer tier starts at $10 with ~10x limits

free_tiers.free_offer: Free playground + API for anyone with a GitHub account, tiered by Copilot plan
free_tiers.limits: low-tier models 15 RPM / 150 RPD (Copilot Free/Pro; 300 Business, 450 Enterprise), high-tier models 10 RPM / 50 RPD; 8K tokens in / 4K out per request; 5 (low) / 2 (high) concurrent
free_tiers.models: GPT-4.1 / GPT-5 / o3 / o4-mini, Llama 4 Scout & Maverick, Phi-4, DeepSeek-R1, Mistral Small/Medium (no Anthropic models in catalog)
free_tiers.catch: docs call it experimentation-only; 8K-in/4K-out per-request caps rule out long context; production path = paid opt-in or bring-your-own Azure/OpenAI key

free_tiers.free_offer: 10,000 neurons/day of inference included in Workers Free and Paid plans
free_tiers.limits: 10K neurons/day hard daily allocation; per-model neuron rates published (e.g. llama-3.2-1b 2,457 neurons/M input tokens; gpt-oss-120b 31,818/M input, 68,182/M output) — roughly 4M input tokens/day on a 1B model or ~314K input tokens/day on gpt-oss-120b (derived arithmetic from official rates)
free_tiers.card_required: not stated (Workers Free signup is generally card-free)
free_tiers.catch: neurons meter compute, so output tokens burn 5-10x faster than input; hard daily cutoff on the Free plan
free_tiers.confidence: verified (allocation + per-model rates official; token translations are our division)

free_tiers.free_offer: Free API mode by default, no card, for testing/prototyping
free_tiers.limits: unpublished — docs state the dimensions (req/s, tokens/min, tokens/month) but actual values are shown per-account in the Admin Console; widely-cited figures (1 RPS / 500K TPM / 1B tokens-month) are NOT on any public official page
free_tiers.models: officially unscoped in public docs; third parties report all API models rate-limited free (unverified scope)
free_tiers.card_required: no (official: 'API access is enabled by default with no credit card required')
free_tiers.catch: free-plan data is used for model training BY DEFAULT — you must manually disable the training toggle; Scale-plan customers are opted out by default
free_tiers.confidence: mixed (free mode / no card / default-training verified; exact numbers login-walled)

free_tiers.free_offer: Free trial (evaluation) API key, no card
free_tiers.limits: 1,000 API calls/month total; per-endpoint trial rates: Chat 20 RPM, Rerank 10 RPM, Embed 2,000 inputs/min
free_tiers.models: Command A family, Command R+/R/R7B, Embed, Rerank
free_tiers.catch: evaluation scale only; the same 1,000/month cap also applies to production keys on the newest Chat variants (sales contact to lift)

free_tiers.free_offer: Free tier applied automatically when no payment method is linked
free_tiers.limits: 20 RPM / 20 requests per day / 200K tokens per day, uniform across free-tier models
free_tiers.catch: 20 requests/day is demo-only despite the very fast inference; Developer tier (card linked) lifts to 20M tokens/day

free_tiers.free_offer: Monthly USD micro-credits usable across 200+ provider-routed models at passthrough prices
free_tiers.limits: $0.10/month included credits on free accounts ('subject to change'); PRO $2.00/month; Team/Enterprise $2.00 per seat pooled
free_tiers.models: whatever the integrated providers serve (DeepSeek-V3, Llama, FLUX.1-dev, ...)
free_tiers.catch: $0.10 is a handful of big-model requests; credits apply only to HF-routed requests, not custom provider keys

free_tiers.free_offer: GLM Flash models priced Free for input, cached input, AND output
free_tiers.limits: unpublished — per-key limits visible after login (z.ai/manage-apikey/rate-limits); concurrency 'dynamically adjusted'; third-party figures (~1 RPS / ~1K RPD) unverified
free_tiers.catch: opaque, shifting concurrency limits (single-in-flight throttling reported even on paid tiers); China-headquartered provider — weigh your data sensitivity

trial_credits_not_free_tiers.note: trial API credits at signup (1,000 requests; +4,000 with a business email — figures from NVIDIA staff forum answers, not a docs page), prototyping-only license, 90-day enterprise-eval path; browser playground use is free and unmetered
new-user per-model free token quotas, hard 90-day expiry from activation, Singapore region only, real-time inference only
trial_credits_not_free_tiers.confidence: verified (offer + expiry; per-model amounts not publicly extractable)

discontinued_or_never_free.note: no free models and no free trial as of 2026-07 — official docs: 'Together AI does not currently offer free trials'; $5 minimum prepaid purchase required; the legacy -free endpoints (Llama-Vision-Free, DeepSeek-R1-Distill-70B-free) are gone from the models list. Ignore stale listicles.
no free tier — official limits page: 'you need to recharge at least $1 to start using'; Tier0 ($1) = 3 RPM / 500K TPM / 1.5M TPD
the free daily allowance tied to a $5 deposit was discontinued; now subscription plans from $3/month
discontinued_or_never_free.confidence: reported (pricing pages via search; not directly fetched)

discontinued_or_never_free.note: the much-cited $150/month data-sharing credits program is no longer documented on any public official page (the docs.x.ai data-sharing page 404s; billing FAQ describes prepaid credits only) — we won't print numbers we can't verify; check console.x.ai after login
discontinued_or_never_free.confidence: unverified (official pages omit or contradict third-party claims)
